title: artemisia spicata subsp. villarsii
intro: Artemisia spicata subsp. villarsii, also known as French wormwood, is a subspecies of the Artemisia spicata plant, which is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of French wormwood include its ability to fight off infections, improve mental clarity, and provide antioxidant protection. French wormwood can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine for its antiviral and antifungal properties.
